retry_reason: Failure indicates the refcount was zero and the object is being destroyed; retrying will not revive it.
contract_summary: This wrapper conditionally acquires a reference on an amdgpu_reset_domain object by incrementing its kref count, but only if the object is still alive (refcount non-zero). Returns true if the reference was acquired; the caller must later call kref_put (or the corresponding release function) to drop the reference. On failure (false), the object is being freed or already freed and must not be used. This is a get-wrapper that transfers ownership of a reference to the caller on success.
